text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Before I sleep, I often light a stick of incense
given to me by my grandmother.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The calming scent gently spreads through my
whole room, contributing to a good night's rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to this, I am feeling refreshed and
energized. Now, let's begin today's training!
